results.evidence: post-tool-use.sh line 333: safe_run_background with FILE_PATH argument
Timeout raised to 15s + sync backgrounded eliminates timeout errors
task-ac-sync-guard.sh accepts $1 as file path in background mode, stdin fallback for sync mode
